risk_factors.name: Split Ticket Risk
risk_factors.description: Separately booked tickets mean a delay on the first ticket can void the second. No airline obligation to rebook.
risk_factors.warning_template: Split ticket: 前段延误将导致后段作废，建议预留至少 6 小时转机时间。

risk_factors.name: Short Connection Risk
risk_factors.warning_template: 转机时间过短（不足 2 小时），建议延长转机时间。

risk_factors.name: Baggage Recheck Risk
risk_factors.description: Split tickets require collecting and rechecking baggage.
risk_factors.warning_template: 行李需取出后重新托运，增加转机时间要求。

risk_factors.name: Overnight Stay Risk
risk_factors.description: Itinerary may require an overnight layover.
risk_factors.warning_template: 需过夜转机，增加住宿成本及时间。

risk_factors.name: Airport Transfer Risk
risk_factors.description: Transfer between different airports (e.g. JFK to LGA) adds complexity.
risk_factors.warning_template: 需换机场转机（如 JFK -> LGA），需要额外时间和交通安排。

risk_factors.name: Visa/Entry Risk
risk_factors.description: Some routings may require transit visas or entry clearance.
risk_factors.warning_template: 该路线可能需要过境签证，请确认签证要求。

risk_factors.name: Hidden City Ticketing Risk
risk_factors.description: Booking a flight with a layover at the actual destination and not flying the final leg. Against airline terms.
risk_factors.warning_template: 检测到潜在 hidden city 出票方案。这是违反航空公司规定的行为，不推荐使用。行李将被运至票面目的地，且航空公司可能取消回程。

risk_factors.name: Price Expiration Risk
risk_factors.description: Mock prices may not reflect real-time availability.
risk_factors.warning_template: 当前价格为模拟数据，实际价格以出票时为准。
